title: Cross-Page Genome Sync (storage.onChanged, versioning)
description: Implement cross-context Genome synchronisation in lib/genome/sync.ts. Uses chrome.storage.onChanged listener so popup, options page, content script panel, and background SW all stay in sync without polling. Schema versioning: include a version field in the stored Genome; migration function for future schema changes. Handles concurrent writes (last-write-wins with timestamp). Requires Genome Editor (P2.2) to be complete so the Options page can trigger changes. TDD for onChanged propagation and version migration.
